title: Dictionary Metadata Schema
description: Schema for an individual dictionary object within the main 'dictionaries.json' file.

dictId.description: Unique identifier for the dictionary (e.g., ms-de-ro).

buildVersion.description: The unique build version string, combining the public version and a build ID (e.g., v1.0-A4T7H).

schemaVersion.description: Version of the entry schema this dictionary's entries adhere to (e.g., 1.0).

message.description: A descriptive message or title for the dictionary.

type.description: Type of dictionary, often language pair (e.g., de-ro).

path.description: The directory name where this dictionary resides. Should match the folder name.
